questions.label: Where will the server run?
questions.help: Local stdio for Claude Desktop/Code, or an HTTP server for Docker/systemd.

questions.label: Public base URL
questions.help: e.g. https://mcp.example.com — required for OIDC and MCP Apps.

questions.label: HTTP endpoint path
questions.help: Mount path for the MCP endpoint, e.g. /mcp. Defaults to /mcp when unset.

questions.label: Bind host
questions.help: Interface the HTTP server binds to. Default 127.0.0.1.

questions.label: Port
questions.help: TCP port for the HTTP server. Default 8000.

questions.label: Bearer token
questions.help: Any non-empty string enables bearer auth. Browser-only.

questions.label: OIDC discovery URL
questions.help: e.g. https://auth.example.com/.well-known/openid-configuration

questions.label: OIDC client secret
questions.help: Browser-only; never in the shareable link.

questions.label: OIDC JWT signing key
questions.help: Required on Linux/Docker — the default is ephemeral and invalidates tokens on restart. Generate: openssl rand -hex 32.

questions.label: Bearer tokens file (TOML)
questions.help: Path to a TOML file of per-token subjects; overrides the single BEARER_TOKEN.

questions.label: Bearer default subject
questions.help: Subject assigned to the single bearer token. Default bearer-anon.

questions.label: Event store URL (HTTP resumability)
questions.help: Alternative event-store URL for HTTP resumability; prefer KV_STORE_URL for new deployments.

questions.label: MCP Apps domain
questions.help: Public domain that serves MCP Apps UI resources.

questions.label: Server instance name
questions.help: Display name for this server instance. Defaults to image-generation-mcp.

questions.label: OpenAI API key
questions.help: Required for the OpenAI provider (DALL-E 3, GPT-Image-1). Leave blank to skip OpenAI.

questions.label: Google API key (Gemini)
questions.help: Required for the Gemini provider (Imagen 3). Leave blank to skip Gemini.

questions.label: SD WebUI host URL
questions.help: Base URL of a running AUTOMATIC1111/Forge/reForge instance, e.g. http://localhost:7860. Leave blank to skip SD WebUI.

questions.label: SD WebUI checkpoint
questions.help: Checkpoint/model name the SD WebUI provider selects before generating. Leave blank to use the instance's current model.

questions.label: Default provider
questions.help: Provider used when no keyword triggers auto-selection. "auto" picks the first configured provider.

questions.label: Paid providers (CSV)
questions.help: Comma-separated provider names billed as paid (used for cost warnings). Default: openai.

questions.label: Read-only mode
questions.help: Disables write tools (generate, transform). Default: true.

questions.label: Scratch directory
questions.help: Directory where generated images are saved. Defaults to ~/.image-generation-mcp/images/.

questions.label: Styles directory
questions.help: Directory holding style-preset files. Defaults to ~/.image-generation-mcp/styles/.

questions.label: Transform cache size
questions.help: LRU cache size for image transforms. Default: 64.

questions.label: Max input image bytes
questions.help: Maximum accepted input image size in bytes. Default: 20971520 (20 MiB).

questions.label: Allow local file input
questions.help: Enable reading input images from local file paths. Default: false.

questions.label: Log level
questions.help: One of DEBUG, INFO, WARNING, ERROR.

questions.label: Rich logging
questions.help: Enable pretty terminal output. Disable for JSON/plain logs in production.

guards.message: No provider is configured — the server will start but cannot generate images. Fill in at least one of: OpenAI API key, Google API key, or SD WebUI host.
OIDC needs BASE_URL set and (on Linux/Docker) OIDC_JWT_SIGNING_KEY — the default key is ephemeral and invalidates tokens on restart.
